name: plugin-owned-target-exporter-registration
title: Plugin-owned target artifact exporter registration through the extension pipeline
description: Add a narrow generic C++ boundary for extension/plugin-owned target artifact exporter registration and migrate Toy metadata exporter registration through it.
creator: codex
notes: Implemented plugin-owned target artifact exporter bundle registration through the target/export boundary. Toy metadata exporter registration is now populated through the enabled extension plugin registry instead of a direct builtin target exporter call. Focused C++ tests, focused Toy lit tests, git diff --check, and check-tianchenrv passed. No RVV runtime/correctness/performance claim was made.
